description_long: This object is a commercial passenger airplane with a streamlined fuselage and a pair of long, slightly swept-back wings mounted low on the body. The tail section features a conventional vertical stabilizer with a blue and yellow livery, including a star emblem, and a horizontal stabilizer mounted at the base of the fin. The airplane's exterior is primarily metallic silver with blue and yellow accent stripes running along the fuselage. The cockpit is located at the front of the fuselage, with a slightly rounded nose and a row of windows along the side, indicating a multi-seat, enclosed configuration. The engines are not visibly mounted under the wings or on the fuselage, suggesting they may be integrated or not modeled in detail. The landing gear is not visible, implying it may be retracted or not depicted in this representation.
description: A streamlined commercial passenger airplane with a silver body, blue and yellow accents, and a conventional tail featuring a star emblem. The wings are low-mounted and slightly swept back, with a forward cockpit and no visible engines or landing gear.
description_view_0: Front view showing the narrow nose, forward cockpit, and the full span of the low-mounted, swept-back wings.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the elongated fuselage, blue and yellow tail with star emblem, and the absence of visible engines or landing gear.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the vertical and horizontal stabilizers, the tapering fuselage, and the symmetrical wing configuration.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the fuselage, tail design, and accent stripes, with no visible engines or landing gear.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing configuration with long, slightly swept-back wings and no visible winglets or pronounced dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: No visible engines present on the wings or fuselage.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers at the base.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Landing gear not visible; configuration not apparent.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit integrated into the nose of the fuselage, likely multi-seat with side windows.
